title: Aagaayam Ithanai Naal Lyrics Unakkum Enakkum
stanzas:
Aagaayam ithanai naal
manmeedhu veezhaamal
thoonaaga thaanguvadhu
kadhal thaan

aandaandu kaalangal
boologam poo pookka
azhagaana kaaraname
kadhal thaan

panja boothangal yaavum
kadhalin adimai
naatkal aezhum kadhalin
kizhamai
onbadhu kolgalum
kaadhalai suttri varum

maram yaera yaeniyai
thanthaal malai yaeri
kodi yaetrum
kundoosi kayyil thanthaal
kinare thondi vidum

verungallai vairakkallaai
kadhal paarvai maatri vidum
venneeril vittaal kooda
kadhal meen neendhum

Kashtam kadhaluku ishtam
vettri pera vendum endral
kadhal edhaiyum thaangidume

muttu kadhavugalai thattum
sarukki varum padhai ellaam
vetri padiyaai maatridume

idhu neruppil seitha
irumbu valaiyamae
irumanam virumbi
thunindhu nulaiyume
bayangalum thayakkamum
vidumurai eduthidume

veraodu verai oottri
kadhal endrum vendruvidum
veriyodu oadum podhu
thadayai udaithu vidum

kadal neerai thaekkum podhu
uppaai thaane maari vidum
kanneerai thaekkum kadhal
muththaal maatri vidum

Kadhal kaetukondu varumaa
thottathil paravai vandhaal
vaeli enna thaduthidumaa

kadhal, kaattu sedi pole
kattalaigal potta podhum
pookkal pookka maruthidumaa

puli vazhum guhai ullae
kizhi vazhum veerathai
manadhodu thandhidume
kadhal thaan.

idhu pogum vazhiyo
vethhu paadhai
thirumbum vazhiyo
vetri paadhai

kadhal thaandum pravaikellaam
vazhiyil marangal kidaiyaadhu
aanaalum kandam thaandum
siragugal valikkaadhu

malai aerum erumbin kaalgal
veliyil miththu udaiyaadhu
manadhodu kadhal vanthaal
manithaa thadai yaedhu.

seo.title: Aagaayam Ithanai Naal Lyrics Unakkum Enakkum
seo.description: Full Aagaayam Ithanai Naal songs lyrics, Unakkum Enakkum Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Devi Sri Prasad(DSP), Singer(s): SPB.
seo.keywords: Unakkum Enakkum, Devi Sri Prasad(DSP), SPB, Aagaayam Ithanai Naal full lyrics, Unakkum Enakkum songs lyrics, Aagaayam Ithanai Naal lyrics snippets, Aagaayam Ithanai Naal WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Aagaayam Ithanai Naal lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Aagaayam Ithanai Naal from the movie Unakkum Enakkum, a timeless romantic classic. Sung by the legendary SPB and composed by the talented Devi Sri Prasad, this song beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and devotion. Dive into its soothing tunes and let it transport you to a world of heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: The sky has been this way for so long, lyrics for you and me.
The sky has stood firm without falling to the earth, supported by love.
Year after year, the earth blooms with flowers; the beautiful reason is love.
All five elements are servants of love; all seven days are dedicated to love, and all nine planets revolve around it.
When a tree is climbed with a ladder, when a mountain is scaled with a flag raised, when a spinning top is given to the hand, a well is dug.
Ordinary stones are turned into precious gems by the gaze of love; even in water, love's fish will swim.
Love enjoys challenges; if it seeks victory, it will endure anything.
Locked doors will be knocked upon; the path will be cleared, and all roads will lead to success.
Without looking back, it will bring down the stars; without any support, it will achieve victory.
This is iron forged in fire; two hearts unite and strengthen, overcoming fears and doubts.
Roots will intertwine and love will always prevail; when it runs with passion, it breaks through obstacles.
When seawater is filtered, it turns into salt; when tears are wiped away, love transforms them into kisses.
Will love come when called? If a bird enters a garden, will a fence stop it?
Love, like a wild plant, will bloom even when rules are imposed.
In the cave where the tiger lives, it grants courage to the heart; that is love.
This path may be rough, but it leads to success.
This journey reaches the desired heart.
For every bird that crosses the sea, there are no trees on the way, yet its wings do not tire.
The legs of an ant climbing a mountain do not break; when love comes to the heart, what can stop a human?
